claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: an upstream-accepted or production Qiskit remedy, a confirmed Qiskit bug, broad graph-scale behavior, hardware relevance, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: one source-bound compiled R181 active-limb retained-binary64 VF2 entry point has frozen Linux correctness, timing, fixed-34 and BigUint comparison, and process-RSS evidence under the recorded final acceptance decision

title: B4/B8/B10 R181 integrated active-limb superaccumulator replay
